---
title: "Fiscal Regime and Tax Reform"
date: 2020-01-01
description: "Provided technical analysis on macroeconomic and fiscal reform proposals, including the redesign of Brazil's fiscal framework and tax system."
categories: [Fiscal Policy, Macroeconomics]
---

As Senior Economic Advisor to Congresswoman Tabata Amaral, I developed technical briefs and economic assessments on major fiscal and tax reform proposals debated in the Brazilian legislature.

This work covered structural fiscal balance analysis, distributional impacts of proposed tax changes, and comparative international evidence on fiscal rule design. The analysis directly informed the Congresswoman's positions and public communications on macroeconomic policy during a period of significant reform debate in Brazil.
